element_introduction_order.mastery_context: All 1998 F1 drivers and circuits except Jacques Villeneuve (replaced by fictional John Newhouse)
Updated cars, drivers (including Villeneuve), and 2 new circuits (Sepang International Circuit, Indianapolis Motor Speedway)

typical_tension_triggers: Managing tire wear and fuel consumption
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous tension management throughout race; relief comes from successful lap completion and gap management against opponents

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible racing simulation with tunable difficulty; designed for both casual and hardcore players
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased competitive pressure from AI; circuit-specific challenges become apparent
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mastery of vehicle setup, tire management, and racecraft required for championship progression
notable_spikes: Difficult AI competitors on specific circuits

notable_level_patterns.description: Complete 16-race Formula One calendar with persistent points system; vehicle setup and strategy carry between races
Single-race events on any available circuit with customizable difficulty and weather conditions
Racing through 16 diverse international circuits with distinct layout characteristics and difficulty profiles
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Sepang International Circuit (Malaysia) or Indianapolis Motor Speedway (added in expansion)
